prompt: Square full-bleed abstract ray-traced artwork on a continuous pure black background. One single cohesive cobalt-blue liquid sculpture floats unsupported in the center. Its two broad heavy water lobes curl inward and compress around one tall central liquid ridge, forming a powerful symmetrical folded-tide silhouette. Dense navy volume, translucent blue edges, smooth rounded water surface, crisp silver-blue reflections, one small crest. Minimal contemporary optical art, dramatic and elegant, bold at 160x160. Quiet black negative space across the upper fifth for a title. Nothing exists except the one floating blue liquid form and uninterrupted black background. 1024x1024.
